scope: Starships of the Galaxy feat implementation accuracy audit

accuracyPolicy.implementedCorrectDefinition: A feat is implemented_correct only when the current runtime behavior or deliberate metadata/manual policy matches the feat's actual rules shape. Metadata presence alone is not sufficient.
accuracyPolicy.partialDefinition: A feat is implemented_partial when the catalog contains useful metadata or partial hooks, but the rule requires a runtime workflow, picker, resource system, or trigger that is not proven implemented.
accuracyPolicy.metadataCorrectDefinition: A feat is metadata_correct when its rule is intentionally not automatable in this system scope and the catalog explicitly prevents false static automation while giving the GM/player the correct source-reference handling.

feats.name: Starship Tactics
feats.descriptionSummary: Adds a number of Starship Maneuvers to the character's Starship Maneuver Suite equal to 1 + Wisdom modifier, minimum 1; repeatable; Gunnery Specialist can qualify for Gunner maneuvers under the special rule.

observedImplementation.notes: Catalog abilityMeta contains grantRules for STARSHIP_MANEUVERS and excludes static sheet math, which is the right shape, but this audit does not prove the full maneuver-suite picker, repeatable grant accounting, or Gunnery Specialist alternate selection restriction exists.

feats.nextStep: Verify or implement the starship maneuver suite picker and repeatable grant accounting before marking implemented_correct.

feats.name: Tactical Genius
feats.descriptionSummary: Regain all spent Starship Maneuvers at the end of any round in which the character rolls a natural 20 on an attack roll; normally only a natural 20 on a Pilot check to activate a Starship Maneuver restores all maneuvers.

observedImplementation.notes: Catalog abilityMeta correctly describes the recovery trigger and excludes static sheet math, but this audit does not prove that attack rolls, round timing, or maneuver spent-state are actually wired to recover maneuvers.

feats.nextStep: Implement or verify a Tactical Genius hook after a real starship maneuver resource engine exists.

feats.name: Starship Designer
feats.descriptionSummary: Allows designing starships from scratch and custom starship modifications with Mechanics checks, cost/time scaling, aid rules, failed-attempt escalation, emplacement/hull/hyperdrive/shield/weapon customization examples, and GM permission for other modifications.

observedImplementation.notes: Catalog abilityMeta explicitly punts Starship Designer to GM/player handling and excludes static sheet math. This matches the project decision that Starship Designer is intentionally unimplementable as normal automation and should remain a source-reference feat.

feats.nextStep: Keep as metadata-only with GM-facing consult-SOTG language. Do not add fake static bonuses.
